---
name: Content removal request
about: Ask for something to be removed from the website
title: "[REMOVAL] - content removal request description here"
labels: ''
assignees: tommylmt

---

**content description**
Explain what should be removed from the website.
If you can, provide screenshots and additional elements here (page, font name, colors)

**why?**
Explain why should this content be removed from the website.
Include details such as your authority, the eventual copyright violation, the law I'm offending. 

**delay (optional)**
According to yourself, the ideal timing for removing this content.
